ARSENAL_V01032.description: Whenever you create a card, gain {ArsenalPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
ARSENAL_V0991.description: Whenever you play a Colorless card, gain {ArsenalPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
BEGONE_V01032.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold].
BEGONE_V0991.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Dive Bomb+|Minion Dive Bomb}[/gold].
BLADE_OF_INK_V0991.description: This turn, whenever you play an Attack, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
BORROWED_TIME_V01032.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Cards cost an additional {ExtraCost:energyIcons()} this turn.
CHARGE_V01032.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Dive Bomb+|Minion Dive Bomb}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Dive Bombs+|Minion Dive Bombs}[/gold]}.
CHARGE_V0991.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into
[gold]{Cards:plural:{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold]|{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strikes+|Minion Strikes}[/gold]}.
CINDER_V0991.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DOMINATE_V01032.description:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
DOMINATE_V0991.description: Gain {StrengthPerVulnerable:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on the enemy.
EXPECT_A_FIGHT_V01032.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
You cannot gain
additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()})|}
EXPECT_A_FIGHT_V0991.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()}.)|}
FOLLOW_THROUGH_V01032.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have {CardCount} or more other {CardCount:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold], hits an additional time.
FOLLOW_THROUGH_V0991.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If the last card you played this turn was a Skill, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
GRAVE_WARDEN_V01032.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
GRAVE_WARDEN_V0991.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul+|Soul}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
HIDDEN_GEM_V01032.description: A random card without [gold]Replay[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()}.
HIDDEN_GEM_V0991.description: A random card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()}.
SEANCE_V01032.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]Soul[/gold].
SEANCE_V0991.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul+|Soul}[/gold].
SPITE_V01032.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you lost HP this turn,
hits {Repeat:diff()} times.
SPITE_V0991.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you lost HP this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
STOKE_V01032.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}card into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
STOKE_V0991.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw a card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
SWORD_SAGE_V01032.description: [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits an additional time.
SWORD_SAGE_V0991.description: Increase the cost of [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] by 1. [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] now hits an additional time.
